level1.description: Initial parallel search across 12 dimensions covering RL, ML, market microstructure, institutional HFT, infrastructure, regulation, crypto, academia, retail tools, performance metrics, alternative data, and interdisciplinary angles

registrations.dimension_1_technical_architectures: PPO/SAC/DDQN, XGBoost/LSTM/Transformer comparisons, agentic AI approaches, FinRL survey
registrations.dimension_2_historical_evolution: Decimalization, colocation, FPGA adoption, Medallion history, HFT arms race timeline
registrations.dimension_3_current_state_of_art: LiT transformer, DeepLOB, FinBERT sentiment, RL trading survey, FPGA-accelerated AI trading
registrations.dimension_4_quantitative_evidence: Sharpe ratios, transaction costs, colocation pricing, capacity limits, implementation shortfall models
registrations.dimension_5_stakeholder_analysis: Renaissance, Optiver, Jane Street, Two Sigma, Citadel, Jump Trading, retail bot platforms
registrations.dimension_6_competing_approaches: RL vs supervised ML, FPGA vs GPU vs CPU, market making vs arbitrage, crypto vs equities
registrations.dimension_7_criticisms_limitations: 90%+ failure rate, overfitting detection, latency arbitrage, RL limitations, transaction cost analysis
registrations.dimension_8_contrarian_perspectives: Zero-sum game critique, AI bot marketing hype, retail viability debate, academic RL skepticism
registrations.dimension_9_future_trajectories: Agentic AI predictions, CBDC/MiCA impact, quantum/neuromorphic, democratization trends
registrations.dimension_10_regulatory_legal: SEC Rule 15c3-5, MiFID II, Reg SCI, FINRA market access, algorithmic trading compliance
registrations.dimension_11_geographic_variation: US vs EU vs Asia vs crypto markets, Chinese quant firms, regulatory havens
registrations.dimension_12_practical_case_studies: LTCM failure, Almgren-Chriss optimal execution, backtesting frameworks, genetic programming strategies

notes: Level 1 searches exceeded 216+ source target directly. No BFS expansion needed.
